Data Processing Addendum (UAE PDPL) and Privacy Notice — Naaqah Sands Capital PJSC (DIFC Branch) — Deal/Issuer Workflows
Controller: Naaqah Sands Capital PJSC; DPO: Dr. Noura Al Manasi; contact: dpo@naaqahsands.ae; Trade Licence: TL-99421-FIC (fictional)
We process PDPL personal data including name, work contact details, Emirates ID copy, trade licence details, nationality and family-origin declarations for AML/KYC, role/title, and access logs.
For listing-preparation and financing mandates, we maintain insider lists per SCA/DFSA/FSRA rules, including access time stamps, wall-crossing consents, and blackout window status.
MNPI examples: pre-public commercial terms of a virtual asset token pre-sale (discount tiers, lock-ups) for issuer “SandHex Labs FZ-LLC,” code-named Project Dune Falcon, and ESG-linked covenant triggers under a climate metric.
We may handle indicators from an unreported cyber incident affecting an issuer’s custody node to assess materiality and notify regulators; such data is restricted and subject to information barriers.
Access to MNPI is restricted to a clean team on the “IB-Wall North” data room; calendar invitations marked “clean only” are reviewed where necessary to monitor barrier effectiveness.
Lawful bases include contract performance, compliance with UAE PDPL and market-abuse regimes, and legitimate interests in transaction execution; where required we obtain explicit consent.
Transfers: data may be processed by Bayt Qamar Services LLC (ADGM), and by Kharif Cloud B.V. (EU) under UAE PDPL transfer mechanisms and ADGM/DIFC adequacy-equivalent safeguards.
Retention: Emirates ID copies and KYC files are kept 7 years; insider lists and wall-crossing records 5 years; deal-room MNPI is deleted or anonymised 30 days after abort or 180 days after final public disclosure.
Data subject rights (access, correction, erasure, objection, portability) may be exercised by emailing dsar@naaqahsands.ae; responses are typically within 30 days subject to PDPL exemptions for market integrity.
Employees are prohibited from tipping or selective disclosure; no sharing of Project Dune Falcon terms with sales desks during blackout; communications are monitored for WhatsApp/Signal usage policy compliance.
For ESG/climate diligence we process scenario models tied to an issuer’s energy intensity baseline before publication; such analysis is confidential and could affect pricing on ADX/DFM or ADGM venues.
Educational note: our public webinar on crypto custody, cyber hygiene, and climate reporting uses generic case studies and does not reference any live issuer, insider list, or blackout information.
Operations: our marketing brochures may mention “token pre-sales,” “insider controls,” and “information barriers” to describe our services, but contain no MNPI or client-specific commercial terms.
Special category considerations: we do not collect biometric templates; family-origin is recorded only as declared for KYC and is not used for profiling beyond sanctions/PEP screening.
If you believe we processed your PDPL data beyond stated purposes, contact Dr. Noura Al Manasi or escalate to the competent supervisory authority in DIFC/ADGM as applicable.
